name: codebase-impact does not descend into .gitignored directories (node_modules, dist, etc.)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codebase-impact.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -E "node_modules" impact.txt && exit 1; echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p tree/node_modules && printf 'console.log(1)\n' > tree/node_modules/dep.js && printf 'console.log(2)\n' > tree/a.js

printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: nc
    name: nc
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -l console.log"
' > rule.yaml
